title: Chamber of Refractions
public_claim: Chamber of Refractions is a MuranoOS room handoff for transforming techniques into counterintelligence-relevant interpretive primitives.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes material through illusion structure, cognitive lever, CI primitive, transposition pattern, governance constraint, audience-specific view, and build planning so a technique can become a governed analytical room.
use_value: It matters because the room makes interpretive transfer explicit: technique becomes mechanism only after the transformation chain and its constraints are named.
